name: landing-app
// targets: to see all targets run: nx show project landing-app --web

options.command: VITE_E2E_COVERAGE=true VITE_API_BASE_URL_MODE=same-origin pnpm exec vite build --config apps/frontend/landing/vite.config.mts && pnpm --filter @repo/tooling tooling testing frontend-browser-e2e-coverage --dist dist/apps/frontend/landing --app-name landing-app --contains "Launch a full-stack Nest and React product foundation." --coverage-dir coverage/e2e/apps/frontend/landing
